mapper.select: SELECT stage FROM daily_stage_claim WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND claim_date = #{claimDate}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO daily_stage_claim (user_id, claim_date, stage) VALUES (#{userId}, #{claimDate}, #{stage})
INSERT IGNORE INTO achievement_progress (user_id, achievement_type, claimed) VALUES (#{userId}, #{achievementType}, 0)
mapper.update: UPDATE achievement_progress SET claimed = 1 WHERE user_id = #{userId} AND achievement_type = #{achievementType} AND claimed = 0
